MINI MINUTES:

P. RICHARD COLOMBATTO, ESQ. of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter, Tel No. 510-457-3459 appearing for Defendants Christie West, Thomas West, and Timothy West.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel.
